title: SubsetSnapshot
description: Response object returned by the Electric HTTP API when any subset__* parameters are present. Contains a data array of operation messages and PostgreSQL snapshot metadata.

metadata.description: PostgreSQL snapshot metadata used by clients to determine which subsequent change-stream events to skip.

xmin.description: Minimum active transaction ID at snapshot time (uint64 as string).

xmax.description: Next transaction ID that had not yet started at snapshot time (uint64 as string).

xip_list.description: Transaction IDs that were in-progress during the snapshot (uint64 as strings).

snapshot_mark.description: Random number identifying this snapshot, matching snapshot_mark in operation headers.

database_lsn.description: PostgreSQL write-ahead log sequence number at snapshot time.

data.description: Array of operation messages representing the subset snapshot data (no control messages).
